label: kinetic energy
semantics: dimensional: dim(lhs) MUST equal dim(rhs) exactly (integer vectors); the record asserts the definitional relation between quantity KINDS, not a world-layer numeric fact
notes: Scalar exhibit: the ½ is dimensionless and invisible to the dimension check — dimensional consistency is NECESSARY, not sufficient (E = m·v² also checks). Recorded as the honest limit of the A5 verifier.
